About

Hi, I'm Crystal.

I've spent my career at the intersection of nonprofits, healthcare, technology, and finance. I built the TrustCloak API and Secure & Grow Framework because I got tired of watching good teams treat compliance like a wall instead of something to build with.

Compliance done right isn't the thing that slows you down. It's the thing that lets you move faster than everyone else, because you're not scrambling to fix what you built wrong the first time.

What I Do

I speak. I build. I teach.

Zone 01 — On Stage

Speaking

I work with boards, CTOs, compliance officers, and non-technical staff, and I make sure every one of them walks away with something. Technical depth for the engineers. Strategic framing for the executives. A plan they can act on for everyone else.

Not everyone gets everything I share. That's fine. Every talk has something for everyone in the room.

Zone 02 — Behind the Scenes

Building

I work with healthcare and regulated-industry teams building AI-powered applications. I help them separate the experimental from the protected, using the Two-Zone Architecture I created: one zone where teams can move fast and try things, one zone that's locked down, encrypted, and fully audited.

Innovation and protection, living side by side instead of fighting each other.

Where I Speak

Founder. Facilitator. Advocate.

Training

Cybersecurity training & public education

Workshops like Anatomy of a Scam, built to make cyber threats make sense to people who've never thought about them before.

Governance

AI governance & compliance architecture

Helping regulated teams build with AI without gambling their license to operate.

Advocacy

Policy & advocacy storytelling

Bringing hard truths to government and policy audiences in language that lands.

Why This Work

Not more data.
Clean data.

I don't share information for the sake of it. Information is everywhere now. Everyone uses AI already. What people actually need is someone to organize it, consolidate it, translate it into something they can use. That's the job.

When I speak, I give you the why behind key technical decisions.

I want you to understand the stakes, see the shift, feel the weight of the decision in front of you. The how is where the real work happens, and that's what I build with clients one-on-one.

Let's Talk
